alkylation reagent: alkylation of cysteine residues using 15 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation of cysteine residues using 15 mM iodoacetamide
instrument: analyzed on an Orbitrap Q-Exactive HF mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: using 5 mM dithiothreitol (10197777001, MilliporeSigma) for 1 hour at 37°C
reduction concentration: using 5 mM dithiothreitol (10197777001, MilliporeSigma) for 1 hour at 37°C
